title: Floi's Precambrian
body:
**Floi's hadean mod**

this mod is highly inspired by the Prehistoric Nature mod 


 

**How to get to the Hadean dimension**

first make a Hadean Portal Igniter (use JEI or any other similar mod)

to enter the Hadean dimension you need to find a Armorer villager (a villager that use a Blast Furnace) and trade him iron for Hadean portal block (portal made same as the nether portal) 

then you have made it to the Hadean and time to explore    

     

 

**Hadean dimension Biomes**

Hadean ash  
    
Hadean wastes  

Hadean lava fields  




**Archean dimension Biomes**

Archean shallow ocean

Archean waterholes 

**Proterozoic dimension Biomes**      

Cryogenian land                  
                   
Cryogenian ocean                
               
Paleoproterozoic land                
          
Paleoproterozoic ocean                                   
             
Neoproterozoic plains             
                 
Mesoproterozoic ocean                      
            
Ediacaran land          
            
Ediacaran sea         


**original plan**  
originally the mod was just about the Hadean
